page_content:
RUSS102 Intensive Elementary Russian II (6 Credits)

A continuation of RUSS101 which will further develop the four

skills: reading, writing, listening and speaking with an emphasis on communicative competence.

Prerequisite: RUSS101 or RUSS102; and must have appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score.

Restriction: Must not be a native/fluent speaker of Russian.
